entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","beac2010-20a3-4759-85b6-01d10ea2ea0a","o|","auto","b|T","a|","1ee2e0fb-effe-4361-8587-e6e60ee64ecd","a|D|8","id","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","feedbackStates","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","toolUseStates","chatHistory","draftExchange","a|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R","2025-11-21T07:26:04.692Z","claude-sonnet-4-5","b|F","isAgentConversation","hasDirtyEdits","a|W|X","o|Y|B|V","n|0","request_message","rich_text_json_repr","mentioned_items","status","a|b|c|d|e","","type","content","a|h|i","doc","a|h","paragraph","o|l|m","a|n","o|j|k|o","draft","o|f|g|p|C|q","o|S|D|T|T|9|U|C|V|V|Z|a|9|C|r","name","rootTaskUuid","a|F|t|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|u|P|Q|R","Multi-Channel Intelligence Desk Architecture\n","2025-11-21T07:26:04.757Z","2026-03-12T21:26:17.413Z","hasTitleGenerated","a|W|X|z","o|10|B|B|B","1ca4ff4a-5f02-4a59-9b1a-b562cfd7e172","a|b|c|e","Read the file Calibrated_Inference_Action_System_Blueprint.md and follow the guidance and conduct the fullscale fix and update for our project","text","a|h|15","o|16|15|14","a|17","o|j|m|18","a|19","o|j|k|1A","o|13|14|1B|q","o|v|8|w|x|y|9|U|C|V|B|11|a|12|9|C|1C","o|E|s|1D","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|1F|1G","o|1H|V|C","o|7|8|9|A|B|C|1E|1I"],"1J"]
